title: Westland Rose Feed & Protect Concentrates 2 in 1 (2 x 500 ml) Green 20100417
features: Contains calcium and sulphur to strengthen
Helps roses absorb more water for improved health
2 in 1 Action - Rose Feed 500ML & Buxus Protect 500ML
description: From the manufacturer Westland Rose 2 in 1 Feed & Protect Westland Rose Feed & Protect has been specially formulated to support rose health from the inside out. This 2-in-1 solution comprises of two bottles. The first contains a concentrated rose feed for greener foliage and more vibrant, fragrant flowers. The second contains a specially formulated protection concentrate to help deter black spot. Key Benefits Feed for greener foliage and more vibrant blooms Protects and deters black spot Pet, Bee and Child friendly Westland Rose 2 in 1 Feed & Protect Why Use The correct nutrition is the best way to ensure that plants are at their best every year. Rose Feed & Protect works from the inside out to strengthen and stimulate roses so they remain pest and disease free, with greener and glossier foliage and abundant, fragrant blooms. When to Use Apply Westland Rose 2 in 1 Feed & Protect every 7-14 days from early spring (March) to late summer (August). How to Use 1. Fill a watering can with 1 litre of water. 2. Measure 5ml on each feed & protect bottle. 3. Mix both feeds in the watering can. 4. Apply around the plant until saturated. What to Expect Feed The green feed bottle boosts plant energy for more fragrant, beautiful flowers and greener foliage. Protect The red protect bottle has minerals to enhance the plant’s natural immune system.
